---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new check, integration, or capability
labels: enhancement
---

## What you'd like

One or two sentences on the feature.

## Why

The user need or scenario. If this is a new audit check, link to authoritative documentation (Google, Schema.org, W3C, etc.) that justifies it.

## Alternatives considered

What else you tried or thought about.

## Additional context

Anything else relevant.
